channel.title: World on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in World on Tech Tracker

item.title: The future of e-commerce platforms in india and around the world.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-vmD8fJ-SM1o/Y2IxogKlDsI/AAAAAAAAOmM/zAWfoio1vV87Nt9ezFexcxDzMfkgZShmACNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1667379613383517-0.png" alt=""> Humans, in order to get essential and necessary goods back in ancient times on this planet earth for survival they used to get them through forests like different types of woods and fruits or leafs from trees and plants, different types of meats from animals, drinking water and fish from rivers and oceans etc and services from fellow humans and other living beings in certain activities to name few like help in work to hunt animals or planting seeds in farming agriculture land etc at first any products or services available in this world used to be totally free if you are capable enough to make or get them.
